tools.namespace_description: 🎯 INFOGRAPHICS & VISUALIZATION 💾 DIAGRAMS, CHARTS + ANALYSIS 📊 For CODE: Database, UX, ERD, PlantUML! For Business & Data Analysis: Flowchart, Timeline & more!

tool.name: blocks and arrows_open_diagram_app
tool.title: open_diagram_app
tool.description: Open the Blocks & Arrows diagram application. Create diagrams with AI from text prompts, draw freely on a whiteboard canvas, view and manage your saved diagrams, and access your account. Your personal visual workspace for flowcharts, mind maps, sequences, and more.
